name: Home workspace smoke test
description: Verify that the ReelMatrix workspace opens on Home, loads the object navigation, and shows the current lead desk surfaces.

planSteps.description: Verify that the page loads successfully without a browser error or blank screen.
Verify that the object navigation shows Home, Campaigns, Brand, and Team.
Verify that the top bar shows a live model badge such as "live on mock (offline demo)" or a real provider/model name.
Verify that the Home view shows a Start something area with the "New campaign from an idea" action and the Agent Inbox area for proposed next moves.
